description_long: This is a blocky, stylized green military tank with a prominent turret and a long, black cannon barrel extending from the front. The tank features a rectangular, angular body with layered armor plating and a raised, multi-tiered turret. The sides display large, dark treads with visible wheels, suggesting robust off-road capability. The surface is primarily green with darker green and black accents, giving it a simple, solid color scheme. The tank's design is compact and geometric, with no visible hatches, markings, or additional weaponry aside from the main cannon. The overall appearance is utilitarian and functional, suitable for urban or battlefield environments.
description: A stylized green military tank with a large turret, long black cannon, and prominent treads. The design is blocky and angular, with solid green and black coloring.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the cannon, the layered turret, and the detailed treads with wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide stance, angular armor, and the front face of the turret and treads.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the cannon facing right and the same tread and turret details visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the turret, the end of the cannon, and the rear armor with no visible hatches or markings.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon mounted on the front of the turret; no other weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular armor plating; turret and hull both appear heavily armored with sloped surfaces.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid green color with darker green and black accents; no camouflage pattern visible.
